Containers.Name: 45D Drive Map
Containers.Requires: 45Drives system, such as an X-15 or HL-15
Containers.Description: Embed the 45Drives disk map UI directly in Unraid's Main page and generate map/server metadata on the Unraid host. This plugin is supported on 45Drives systems only, such as X-15 and HL-15 systems.
